mapper.select: SELECT * FROM qna ORDER BY qna_num DESC
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM qna WHERE qna_num IN
#{item}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notice ORDER BY notice_num DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (notice_num, username, notice_title, notice_date, notice_hits, notice_content, table_gb) VALUES (#{noticeNum}, #{username}, #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeDate}, #{noticeHits}, #{noticeContent}, #{tableGb})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM notice WHERE notice_num IN
#{item}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM news ORDER BY news_idx DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO news (news_idx, username, news_title, news_regdate, news_hits, news_content) VALUES (#{newsIdx}, #{username}, #{newsTitle}, #{newsRegdate}, #{newsHits}, #{newsContent})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM news WHERE news_idx IN
#{item}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM clubphoto ORDER BY cp_idx DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clubphoto (cp_idx, username, cp_title, cp_regdate, cp_hits, cp_content) VALUES (#{cpIdx}, #{username}, #{cpTitle}, #{cpRegdate}, #{cpHits}, #{cpContent})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM clubphoto WHERE cp_idx IN
#{item}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ClubVideo ORDER BY cv_idx DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ClubVideo (cv_idx, username, cv_title, cv_date, cv_hits, mv_the_origin_url, cv_content) VALUES (#{cvIdx}, #{username}, #{cvTitle}, #{cvDate}, #{cvHits}, #{mvTheOriginUrl}, #{cvContent})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM ClubVideo WHERE cv_idx IN
#{item}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM K5_Player ORDER BY k5_player_num DESC
SELECT * FROM K7_Player ORDER BY k7_player_num DESC
SELECT * FROM W1_Player ORDER BY w1_player_num DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO K5_Player (k5_player_num, k5_file_path, k5_player_name, k5_player_en_name, k5_player_cap_yn, k5_player_subcap_yn, k5_player_position, k5_player_height, k5_player_weight, k5_player_birth) VALUES (#{k5PlayerNum}, #{k5filePath}, #{k5PlayerName}, #{k5PlayerEnName}, #{k5PlayerCapYn}, #{k5PlayerSubCapYn}, #{k5PlayerPosition}, #{k5PlayerHeight}, #{k5PlayerWeight}, #{k5PlayerBirth})

INSERT INTO K7_Player (k7_player_num, k7_file_path, k7_player_name, k7_player_en_name, k7_player_cap_yn, k7_player_subcap_yn, k7_player_position, k7_player_height, k7_player_weight, k7_player_birth) VALUES (#{k7PlayerNum}, #{k7filePath}, #{k7PlayerName}, #{k7PlayerEnName}, #{k7PlayerCapYn}, #{k7PlayerSubCapYn}, #{k7PlayerPosition}, #{k7PlayerHeight}, #{k7PlayerWeight}, #{k7PlayerBirth})

INSERT INTO W1_Player (k7_player_num, k7_file_path, k7_player_name, k7_player_en_name, k7_player_cap_yn, k7_player_subcap_yn, k7_player_position, k7_player_height, k7_player_weight, k7_player_birth) VALUES (#{k7PlayerNum}, #{k7filePath}, #{k7PlayerName}, #{k7PlayerEnName}, #{k7PlayerCapYn}, #{k7PlayerSubCapYn}, #{k7PlayerPosition}, #{k7PlayerHeight}, #{k7PlayerWeight}, #{k7PlayerBirth})
